# 5D Labs

> 5D Labs is an AI-native venture studio powered by an internal operating stack. CTO is the build engine, the internal trading engine helps finance experimentation and sharpen market intelligence, and OpenClaw orchestrates the system underneath.

## About 5D Labs

5D Labs is an AI-native venture studio that uses OpenClaw, our open-source agent orchestration platform, to coordinate specialized AI agents across development, operations, and venture execution. Rather than betting everything on one product, we built an internal operating stack that helps us discover, finance, validate, and ship new ventures with more speed and better economics than a traditional startup model.

Founded by Jonathon Fritz — 15+ years shipping production systems across AI, blockchain, Kubernetes, and trading infrastructure.

### Our Thesis

Traditional startups burn runway trying to find product-market fit with a single idea. We take a different approach:

1. **Parallel Validation** — Run multiple ventures simultaneously using AI agents
2. **Earlier Traction Detection** — Identify real pull sooner and reallocate quickly
3. **Internal Capital Engine** — Use proprietary market systems to help finance experimentation
4. **OpenClaw Foundation** — Our orchestration layer powers the operating stack
5. **Cost Optimization** — Use bare metal and self-hosted models to improve economics

### What We Do Not Do

- We do not offer managed hosting or cloud provider services
- We do not sell AI models or model APIs
- We do not provide general IT support or help desk services
- We are not a traditional software consultancy or body shop

---

## Operating Stack

### CTO — Multi-Agent AI Engineering Platform (Live)

The commercial build engine. Thirteen specialized AI agents ship complete features from PRD to production on self-healing infrastructure, and the same system is used internally across the studio.

- **Website**: https://cto.5dlabs.ai
- **Status**: Live and in active development
- **Key Stats**: 13 agents, 60-80% cost savings vs cloud, CLI agnostic
- **Agent Roster**:
  - Morgan — Technical Program Manager: Task decomposition, agent assignment, progress tracking
  - Rex — Rust Architect: Backend systems, CLI tools, zero-cost abstractions
  - Grizz — Go Specialist: Go services, infrastructure tooling, simplicity-first
  - Nova — Node.js Engineer: APIs, backend services, rapid prototyping
  - Blaze — Web App Developer: React, TypeScript, UI components, pixel-perfect interfaces
  - Tap — Mobile Developer: Cross-platform mobile apps, native feel
  - Spark — Desktop Developer: Electron/Tauri desktop apps, offline-first
  - Cleo — Quality Guardian: Linting, standards enforcement, refactoring
  - Cipher — Security Sentinel: Security audits, vulnerability scanning, threat modeling
  - Tess — Testing Genius: Test strategy, coverage analysis, automated test suites
  - Stitch — Code Reviewer: PR review, quality checks, automated feedback
  - Atlas — Integration Master: PR merging, branch management, conflict resolution
  - Bolt — Deployment Specialist: Infrastructure, Helm, Kubernetes, GitOps, zero-downtime

### Internal Trading Engine — Proprietary Capital + Market-Intelligence Engine (Internal)

This is 5D Labs' proprietary internal trading system. It helps generate internal revenue, sharpen market intelligence, and finance venture creation. It is not offered as a public service.

- **Status**: Internal and in active development
- **Chains**: Solana (low-latency execution), Base (Ethereum composability), Polygon (Ethereum scaling, institutional adoption), Near (AI-native smart contracts), Sui (Move, object-centric DeFi)
- **Role**: Capital engine and live market-intelligence layer for the studio
- **Reason It Stays Internal**: Selling the system broadly would expose trade secrets and increase direct competition against our own edge

### OpenClaw Platform — Open-Source Agent Orchestration (Building)

Kubernetes-native platform for deploying and managing AI agent fleets. It is the open-source foundation beneath CTO, the internal trading engine, and future ventures.

- **GitHub**: https://github.com/5dlabs/openclaw-platform
- **Status**: Building (alpha)
- **License**: AGPL-3.0
- **Key Features**:
  - One-command TUI installer for desktop KinD clusters or enterprise EKS
  - GitOps via ArgoCD ApplicationSets
  - NATS pub/sub inter-agent messaging
  - Grafana + Loki observability stack
  - Discord bridge for agent communication
  - External Kubernetes Secrets management
  - EKS provisioner for production clusters
  - 16+ agent orchestration tested
- **Architecture**: ArgoCD manages ApplicationSets that auto-deploy agents from Git. NATS provides direct messaging (agent.{id}.inbox) and broadcasts (agent.all.broadcast). Grafana + Loki provide dashboards and log aggregation.

---

## Technology Stack

### OpenClaw — Agent Orchestration Layer

Our open-source agent orchestration platform coordinates AI agents across:

- **AI CLIs**: Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Factory, Gemini — model-agnostic, best tool for each task
- **Self-Hosted Models**: Open-weight models on own hardware (vLLM, Ollama) for cost optimization and zero vendor lock-in
- **Infrastructure**: Self-healing bare metal Kubernetes on Talos Linux
- **Integrations**: GitHub, Linear, MCP (Model Context Protocol) server ecosystem
- **Communication**: NATS pub/sub messaging, Discord bridge

### Infrastructure

- **Compute**: Bare metal Kubernetes on Talos Linux, EKS for managed workloads
- **GitOps**: ArgoCD for automated sync and self-healing deployments
- **Observability**: Prometheus, Grafana, Loki for metrics, dashboards, and log aggregation
- **Secrets**: OpenBao (HashiCorp Vault fork) for secret management
- **Networking**: NATS for inter-agent messaging, Karpenter for auto-scaling

### Supported Blockchains

- **Solana**: Raw speed, sub-second finality, ideal for low-latency and high-throughput execution
- **Base (OP Stack)**: Ethereum L2 composability, DeFi ecosystem access, lower gas costs
- **Near**: AI-native smart contracts, sharding for scalability

---

## Consulting Services

Jonathon Fritz / 5D Labs offers expert consulting for early-stage teams and enterprises building in AI, blockchain, and infrastructure.

### Expertise Areas

1. **AI Agent Systems & OpenClaw**: Multi-agent orchestration, autonomous workflows, MCP integration, model selection and optimization
2. **Blockchain & Solana**: Solana program development, on-chain trading agents, DeFi protocol integration, Base/Polygon/Near/Sui/Ethereum node operations
3. **Infrastructure & DevOps**: Bare-metal Kubernetes, Talos Linux, ArgoCD GitOps, CI/CD pipelines, cloud-to-metal migration
4. **Platform Engineering**: Self-healing systems, observability stacks, secret management, multi-tenant architectures
5. **Security**: Threat modeling, supply chain security, runtime protection, audit automation
6. **Trading Infrastructure Architecture**: Trading architecture, market data processing, and execution optimization

### Pricing (USD)

- **Hourly Advisory**: $225/hr — Ad-hoc consulting, architecture guidance, troubleshooting
- **Daily Intensive**: $1,600/day — Full-day working sessions for workshops, hands-on setup, or team training
- **Monthly Retainer**: $3,500/mo — ~20 hours included with dedicated availability and async support
- **Fixed-Scope Projects**: Varies by project — Architecture audits, proof-of-concepts, and focused deliverables

### Engagement

- **Discovery Call**: https://cal.com/jonathon-fritz-2uhdqe/discovery (free 30-minute consultation)
- **Consulting Page**: https://5dlabs.ai/consulting/
- **Resume**: https://resume.jonathonfritz.com
- **Opportunities (Work With Me)**: https://5dlabs.ai/opportunities/

## Opportunities (Work With Me)

Jonathon Fritz is open to technical co-founder, fractional CTO, and senior infrastructure roles. Full details and case studies: https://5dlabs.ai/opportunities/

### Engagement Types

1. **Technical Co-Founder** — Equity partnership with non-technical or business-focused founders; pre-seed to seed stage in AI, blockchain, or developer tooling. Full-stack architecture from day one; SE→CTO in 3 months at Coinmiles.
2. **Fractional CTO / Advisory** — Negotiable. Part-time technical leadership: strategy, architecture, engineering culture, code reviews, infrastructure. Proven 60–80% cost reductions on cloud-to-bare-metal migrations; investor-facing technical narratives.
3. **Full-Time Remote** — VP/Director of Infrastructure, Head of Platform Engineering, AI Systems / Agent Platform Lead, Principal Engineer (Infrastructure). Early-to-growth-stage US startups; remote-friendly.

### Proof Points

- 20+ years in production infrastructure; 10,600+ GitHub contributions (last year)
- 1B+ daily requests managed (Pocket Network); 13 AI agents shipping production code (5D Labs CTO platform)
- Led 100% Kubernetes adoption with ArgoCD GitOps at Blocknative; Gas Network distributed oracle across 35+ chains
- Resume: https://resume.jonathonfritz.com | Opportunities: https://5dlabs.ai/opportunities/

## Founder

### Jonathon Fritz — Founder & CEO

15+ years of experience shipping production systems across AI, blockchain, infrastructure, and trading. Building at the intersection of AI, crypto, and autonomous systems.

- **Current Focus**: 5D Labs venture studio, OpenClaw agent orchestration, and the internal trading engine across Solana/Base/Polygon/Near/Sui
- **Background**: Full-stack engineering leadership across enterprise and startup environments
- **Specialties**: Multi-agent AI systems, Kubernetes/bare-metal infrastructure, blockchain (Solana, Base, Polygon, Near, Sui), Rust, Go, TypeScript, security, DevOps
- **Profile**: https://5dlabs.ai/founder
